title: Mubert Streaming Link
description: Response shape for /api/v3/public/streaming/get-link. Provides a playable URL plus the stream control identifiers used by restart, set-intensity, and set-loop-state.

url.description: HTTP or WebRTC streaming URL playable in any compatible audio client.

session_id.description: Stream session identifier passed back to control endpoints (restart, set-intensity, set-loop-state).

loop.description: Whether the stream is currently in loop mode.
